commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: - [P2] No narrow automated repair remains; maintainers need to choose the canonical fix path and accept or revise the storage upgrade boundary before merge.; Cleared: The diff is limited to Control UI localStorage code and tests and introduces no new dependency, script, workflow, secret, or supply-chain surface. (sha=950b489e60d785f28d6c9c907179931d71456dd2)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Control UI localStorage load/save logic and storage regression tests so same-origin sibling base paths keep independent gateway selections.

PR surface: Source +124, Tests +650. Total +774 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. On current main, seed the legacy unscoped settings key with Gateway A and load Gateway B without a scoped record; `loadSettings()` can return Gateway A's `gatewayUrl`, which `connectGateway()` uses as the WebSocket target. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No narrow automated repair remains; maintainers need to choose the canonical fix path and accept or revise the storage upgrade boundary before merge.

target.title: fix(control-ui): WebSocket connects to wrong gateway when two share an origin
target.body:
## Summary

- Keeps Control UI gateway settings isolated when two gateways share the same origin but use different base paths.
- Stops adopting same-origin sibling gateway settings from the legacy unscoped localStorage key.
- Preserves upgrade behavior for a legacy custom remote gateway URL on first load.
- Review focus: localStorage compatibility and the same-origin/different-basePath isolation rule.

## Linked context

Closes #97636.

Related: #97643 targets the same root cause but removed too much legacy migration behavior; this branch preserves remote custom gateway migration.

Maintainer request: not directly requested by a maintainer.

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)

- Behavior or issue addressed: Gateway B could connect its WebSocket to Gateway A when both were served from the same origin under different base paths and B had no current scoped settings yet.
- Real environment tested: local Control UI storage/runtime proof on Node 22 with browser-like `localStorage`, `sessionStorage`, `location`, and a WebSocket constructor recorder. The proof imports the actual `ui/src/ui/storage.ts` and `ui/src/ui/gateway.ts` modules from this checkout, then calls `GatewayBrowserClient.start()` to capture the URL handed to WebSocket.
- Exact steps or command run after this patch:
  - `PNPM_CONFIG_MODULES_DIR=/media/vdc/0668001470/workSpace/claw-campaign/openclaw/node_modules /media/vdc/0668001470/workSpace/claw-campaign/openclaw/node_modules/.bin/tsx /tmp/pr97665_gateway_target_proof.ts 2>&1`
  - `PNPM_CONFIG_MODULES_DIR=/media/vdc/0668001470/workSpace/claw-campaign/openclaw/node_modules node /media/vdc/0668001470/workSpace/claw-campaign/openclaw/scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts -- --run --reporter=verbose 2>&1`
- Evidence after fix:

Production connection-target proof:

```text
two base path WebSocket targets:
  /gateway-a -> wss://example.com/gateway-a
  /gateway-b -> wss://example.com/gateway-b
  shared legacy key present: false
legacy sibling migration for wss://example.com/gateway-a:
  loaded gatewayUrl: wss://example.com/gateway-b
  websocket target: wss://example.com/gateway-b
  sessionKey: main
  shared legacy key present: true
legacy sibling migration for /gateway-a/ws:
  loaded gatewayUrl: wss://example.com/gateway-b
  websocket target: wss://example.com/gateway-b
  sessionKey: main
  shared legacy key present: true
legacy sibling migration for wss://example.com/gateway-a/ws:
  loaded gatewayUrl: wss://example.com/gateway-b
  websocket target: wss://example.com/gateway-b
  sessionKey: main
  shared legacy key present: true
legacy sibling migration for root current path:
  loaded gatewayUrl: wss://example.com
  websocket target: wss://example.com
  sessionKey: main
  shared legacy key present: true
legacy custom migration for /ws:
  loaded gatewayUrl: /ws
  websocket target: /ws
  sessionKey: custom-session
  page selection key: /ws
  shared legacy key present: false
legacy custom migration for wss://example.com/ws:
  loaded gatewayUrl: wss://example.com/ws
  websocket target: wss://example.com/ws
  sessionKey: custom-session
  page selection key: wss://example.com/ws
  shared legacy key present: false
legacy custom migration for wss://remote-gateway.example.com:
  loaded gatewayUrl: wss://remote-gateway.example.com
  websocket target: wss://remote-gateway.example.com
  sessionKey: custom-session
  page selection key: wss://remote-gateway.example.com
  shared legacy key present: false
```

Regression test output:

```text
[test] starting test/vitest/vitest.ui.config.ts

 RUN  v4.1.8 /media/vdc/0668001470/tmp/wt-97665-ui

stdout | ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > does not adopt the gateway URL from a sibling gateway sharing the same origin
[gateway-proof] same-origin legacy fallback rejected: stored=wss://gateway.example:8443/gateway-a loaded=wss://gateway.example:8443/gateway-b

stdout | ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > does not adopt a legacy sibling gateway URL when the current page is root-mounted
[gateway-proof] root same-origin legacy fallback rejected: stored=wss://gateway.example:8443/gateway-a loaded=wss://gateway.example:8443

stdout | ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > preserves a legacy custom remote gatewayUrl on first load after upgrade
[gateway-proof] remote legacy fallback preserved: loaded=wss://remote-gateway.example.com session=remote-session

stdout | ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > preserves a legacy same-origin root WebSocket endpoint on first load after upgrade
[gateway-proof] same-origin root websocket endpoint preserved: loaded=/ws session=custom-ws-session

stdout | ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > does not preserve legacy sibling base-path WebSocket endpoint URLs
[gateway-proof] sibling websocket endpoint rejected: stored=/gateway-a/ws loaded=wss://gateway.example:8443/gateway-b
[gateway-proof] sibling websocket endpoint rejected: stored=wss://gateway.example:8443/gateway-a/ws loaded=wss://gateway.example:8443/gateway-b

stdout | ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > keeps per-basePath settings isolated when sibling gateways have distinct configurations
[gateway-proof] same-origin isolation: basePath A=/gateway-a -> wss://multi.example:8443/gateway-a, basePath B=/gateway-b -> wss://multi.example:8443/gateway-b

 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > uses configured base path and normalizes trailing slash 5ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > defaults chat auto-scroll to near-bottom 2ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > infers base path from nested pathname when configured base path is not set 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > skips node sessionStorage accessors that warn without a storage file 2ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > ignores and scrubs legacy persisted tokens 4ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > loads the current-tab token from sessionStorage 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > does not reuse a session token for a different gatewayUrl 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > does not persist gateway tokens when saving settings 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > persists recent sessions collapse state across save and load 2ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > normalizes persisted text scale to the nearest supported stop 2ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > loads valid chat auto-scroll modes and normalizes invalid values 2ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > clears the current-tab token when saving an empty token 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > persists themeMode and navWidth alongside the selected theme 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > persists the browser-local custom theme payload when present 15ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > falls back to claw when persisted custom theme data is invalid 7ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > scopes persisted session selection per gateway 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > caps persisted session scopes to the most recent gateways 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > does not adopt the gateway URL from a sibling gateway sharing the same origin 2ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > does not adopt a legacy sibling gateway URL when the current page is root-mounted 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > preserves a legacy custom remote gatewayUrl on first load after upgrade 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > does not let stale unscoped remote settings override a valid current scoped record 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > does not let invalid legacy settings mask a valid current scoped record 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > does not adopt a sibling gateway from the default fallback key 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > uses the default fallback key when the unscoped legacy key belongs to a sibling 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > uses the default fallback key when the unscoped legacy key is corrupt 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > preserves a legacy same-origin root WebSocket endpoint on first load after upgrade 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > does not preserve legacy sibling base-path WebSocket endpoint URLs 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > preserves legacy current-base WebSocket endpoint URLs 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > does not write to the legacy unscoped settings key when saving 0ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > persists local user identity separately from gateway settings 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > normalizes invalid local user identity values on load 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > removes the persisted local user identity when cleared 0ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > persists a custom remote gatewayUrl so it survives a page reload 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > prefers the page-scoped dev-server gateway override over stale default settings 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > keeps remote gateway payload when the page selection switches back to the default gateway 1ms
 ✓ |ui| ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts > loadSettings default gateway URL derivation > keeps per-basePath settings isolated when sibling gateways have distinct configurations 1ms

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  36 passed (36)
   Start at  14:02:43
   Duration  671ms (transform 115ms, setup 66ms, import 250ms, tests 68ms, environment 0ms)

[test] passed 1 Vitest shard in 1.35s
```

- Observed result after fix: `/gateway-a` opens `wss://example.com/gateway-a` and `/gateway-b` opens `wss://example.com/gateway-b`. Same-origin sibling legacy records are ignored by the current page and left in the shared legacy key for the owning page to migrate. Legitimate custom endpoints such as `/ws`, `wss://example.com/ws`, and `wss://remote-gateway.example.com` are still migrated into the page selection key.
- What was not tested: a deployed reverse proxy with a browser network panel capture.
- Proof limitations or environment constraints: this is local runtime proof with browser-like globals plus constructor target recording, not a deployed gateway capture. It covers both the `loadSettings()` decision and the URL passed by `GatewayBrowserClient.start()` to WebSocket.
- Before evidence: the legacy unscoped key could contain Gateway A's `gatewayUrl` and be accepted by Gateway B when B lacked a scoped key.

## Tests and validation

- `PNPM_CONFIG_MODULES_DIR=/media/vdc/0668001470/workSpace/claw-campaign/openclaw/node_modules /media/vdc/0668001470/workSpace/claw-campaign/openclaw/node_modules/.bin/tsx /tmp/pr97665_gateway_target_proof.ts 2>&1`
- `PNPM_CONFIG_MODULES_DIR=/media/vdc/0668001470/workSpace/claw-campaign/openclaw/node_modules node /media/vdc/0668001470/workSpace/claw-campaign/openclaw/scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts -- --run --reporter=verbose 2>&1`
- `/media/vdc/0668001470/workSpace/claw-campaign/openclaw/node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check ui/src/ui/storage.ts ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts`
- `/media/vdc/0668001470/workSpace/claw-campaign/openclaw/node_modules/.bin/oxlint ui/src/ui/storage.ts ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.json ui/src/ui/storage.ts ui/src/ui/storage.node.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base upstream/main --thinking low --stream-engine-output` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings; overall `patch is correct (0.82)`.
- Regression coverage includes same-origin sibling gateway isolation, root-mounted sibling rejection, sibling `/ws` endpoint rejection, current-base `/ws` preservation, remote custom gateway migration, stale/corrupt legacy fallback handling, page-scoped current gateway selection, default gateway preservation, and token isolation.

## Risk checklist

Did user-visible behavior change? (`Yes/No`) Yes. Same-origin sibling gateway settings are no longer adopted from the legacy key.

Did config, environment, or migration behavior change? (`Yes/No`) Yes. Control UI localStorage fallback behavior changed.

Did security, auth, secrets, network, or tool execution behavior change? (`Yes/No`) Yes, WebSocket target selection is affected.

What is the highest-risk area? Existing users with legacy same-origin custom path settings could lose fallback behavior if it looked like sibling-gateway pollution.

How is that risk mitigated? Different-origin custom remote gateway URLs remain accepted and migrated; same-origin different-basePath legacy records are the reported broken state and are intentionally rejected.

## Current review state

Next action: ClawSweeper/maintainer re-review after body proof refresh.

Waiting on: maintainer acceptance that deterministic storage proof is sufficient, or request for browser/network screenshot proof.

Bot/reviewer comments addressed: preserved and tested legacy custom remote gateway migration while blocking same-origin sibling basePath pollution.

_AI-assisted; implementation and validation reviewed before pushing._
